name: eks-maturity-advisor-plugin
description: Assess EKS maturity with a read-only Codex skill and MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Read-only EKS maturity scans and remediation plans.
interface.longDescription: EKS Maturity Advisor combines a Codex skill and local MCP server to assess Kubernetes manifests and current EKS clusters against K8RVIS maturity controls without mutating files, clusters, or AWS resources.
defaultPrompt: Assess this EKS repo against maturity controls.
Scan my current EKS context read-only.
Create a remediation plan for these findings.
